_meta.title: CLM 7B launch checklist — F1-TC bf16 WMMA integrated, corpus 140GB in flight
_meta.author: launch-checklist-agent (opus-4.6-1m, 1M ctx)
_meta.purpose: Prep 7B training to be fire-ready the moment corpus + H100 slots are available. Captures (a) binary build path, (b) F1-TC integration points, (c) launch sequence, (d) R2 archive plan, (e) dependency graph.
code_refs: training/gpu_train.hexa (gpu_layer_fwd lines 436-438 — 3 separate sgemm = F1 fusion target)
constraints_honoured: NO modification to train_clm_composed.c or runtime.c (sibling session ownership)
HEXA-FIRST strict — all new logic in .hexa
Disk usage minimal — no new files in /tmp, repo-local only

gate_verdict: GREEN for prep, RED for launch (corpus 49% + 0/2 H100 slots free)
optimistic_launch_utc: 2026-04-17T15:00Z (if A1 ends early + C9 NCCL lands + user OK)

binary_prep.goal: Produce train_clm_7b_composed.c + runtime_7b.c binary on H100 pod, scale=7b, F1-TC enabled

new_files_to_create_on_pod_only.path_b: /workspace/runtime_7b.c (copy of current runtime.c — no edits needed)

binary_prep.local_repo_7b_composed_c_path: MUST NOT exist until corpus acquired and scale_7b_gpu validated on real pod. Generation is one-shot pod-side via codegen_c2 to avoid polluting repo with 300KB+ regenerated C source.

build_pathway.step_2_codegen_invocation: hexa build training/train_clm_gpu.hexa --emit-c --out /workspace/train_clm_7b_composed.c — codegen_c2 picks up CLM_SCALE=7b via env and produces composed C with D=4096 NL=32 etc inlined as constants. Alternative: ON-POD `hexa run training/train_clm_gpu.hexa --scale 7b --emit-c` via the existing holo_breakthrough_20260416/cuda_native bootstrap path. The 1.5B path has been validated with the same mechanism (binary_source line 24 in clm_r4_relaunch_20260416.json). Regeneration needed per memory:project_clm_r4_mmap_plan 'scale_1_5b C regen needed' — the 7B regen follows identical pattern.
build_pathway.step_4_nccl_linkage_when_multi_rank: Once C9 NCCL multi-rank binding lands (5 extern fns at $HEXA_LANG/lib/hxnccl/), append `-lnccl -L/usr/local/cuda-12.4/lib64` to the gcc command. Until then the binary will run single-rank only and OOM on 7B (~84GB unsharded Adam > 80GB H100).

source_hexa: training/train_clm_gpu.hexa (entry point with scale_7b_gpu + env dispatch)
training/c4_fused_kernels.hexa (F1 + F1-TC — this file wires in new QKV fusion)
training/clm_mmap_loader.hexa (corpus mmap — bypasses O(n²) list push)
binary_inputs_from_repo.import_chain_risk: memory:feedback_hexa_silent_exit_5_imports — 3+ module chain can emit empty main. Validate build/artifacts/<file>.c body before trusting OK status. Mitigation: run test_scale_7b.hexa locally (already 40/40 PASS) and check composed.c size > 200KB before gcc step.
binary_inputs_from_repo.diff_vs_1_5b_composed: 1.5B composed.c is 291KB. 7B with D=4096 SEQ=4096 and expanded kernel literals should emit ~450-600KB composed.c. If the 7B composed.c ends up < 250KB the codegen stage failed silently — must re-invoke with import chain split.

f1_tc_integration.status: PLUMBING_READY — kernel loads on c4_init_modules(); flag wiring needed before launch
f1_tc_integration.measured_speedup: 10.26x fused bf16 TC vs fp32 MVP on canonical CLM 1B shape (B=8 S=512 d=1024 DhH=1024) per shared/state/c4_f1_tc_bf16_bench_20260417.json#S3_design_doc_shape
f1_tc_integration.applied_to_7b_shape_projection: 7B uses M=SEQ*BATCH=8192 (S=4096, B=2), K_in=D=4096, DhH=4096 (H=32 d_head=128). That is 16× the M of S3 and 4× K_in/DhH — compute-bound regime where TC advantage is 10-12x stable on H100 SXM (design-doc §1.2).

enable_sequence.where: training/train_clm_gpu.hexa after line 1143 println('[train_clm_gpu] kernels: NVRTC compile OK ...')
enable_sequence.action: Insert `use "c4_fused_kernels"` at top of file (after `use "cuda_kernels"`); add block `if env_or("USE_TC", "0") == "1" { let c4_rc = c4_init_modules(); if c4_rc == 0 { let _ = c4_set_tc_mode(1); println("[train_clm_gpu] F1-TC bf16 WMMA ENABLED") } else { println("[train_clm_gpu] WARN F1-TC init rc=" + str(c4_rc) + " — falling back to fp32") } }` between lines 1143 and 1145
enable_sequence.risk: Import of c4_fused_kernels adds 1 module to existing 4+ → watch 5+ silent-exit. Mitigation: run `hexa build training/train_clm_gpu.hexa` locally and verify build/artifacts/train_clm_gpu.c body > 200KB before committing.

enable_sequence.action: Introduce runtime branch: `if G_C4_TC_MODE == 1 && ptr_addr(layer.Wqkv) != 0 { c4_impl_qkv_proj_fwd(acts.norm1, layer.Wqkv, acts.q, acts.k, acts.v, SEQ, D, D/cfg.n_head, cfg.n_head) } else { gpu_sgemm(...); gpu_sgemm(...); gpu_sgemm(...) }`. Access G_C4_TC_MODE via c4_fused_kernels.hexa global.
enable_sequence.dependency: Requires GpuLayer struct to carry a `Wqkv` device ptr (fused [D, 3*DhH]) in addition to existing Wq/Wk/Wv. This means init_gpu_weights must allocate + fill Wqkv by packing the three separately-initialised Wq/Wk/Wv tensors once at init. Launch-time one-shot repack: `cuda_memcpy_d2d(Wqkv + 0*DhH*D, Wq, DhH*D*4); cuda_memcpy_d2d(Wqkv + 1*DhH*D, Wk, DhH*D*4); cuda_memcpy_d2d(Wqkv + 2*DhH*D, Wv, DhH*D*4)`. Memory cost = 3*D*DhH*4 bytes per layer = 3*4096*4096*4 = 192MB per layer → 32 layers = 6.1GB extra VRAM (acceptable on 80GB H100; must factor into FSDP shard plan).
enable_sequence.risk_medium: Double-buffering Wqkv duplicates weights; optimizer updates must be applied to BOTH Wq/Wk/Wv AND Wqkv OR swap to Wqkv-only storage. Simpler path: drop separate Wq/Wk/Wv after init and keep Wqkv only — reduces VRAM by 6.1GB and halves the optimizer state. This is the 7B-launch-ready refactor.
enable_sequence.recommended_impl: Wqkv-only storage from init onwards. Backward path needs symmetric c4_impl_qkv_proj_bwd (F10) or temp unpacking — for MVP launch keep fp32 backward unfused (F1-TC forward only) since forward dominates 60% of flops.

enable_sequence.action: Already done — K_C4_QKV_PROJ_FUSED_TC_FWD ships in K_C4_COMBINED_TU; c4_init_modules emits F1 + F1-TC into single NVRTC PTX; G_C4_TC_MODE flag already wired at line 123

f1_tc_integration.env_toggle: export USE_TC=1 (drives the train_clm_gpu.hexa conditional). Default 0 = fp32 path remains bit-exact baseline.

expected_step_time_with_tc.without_tc_s3_shape_at_1b: 42.9 ms/QKV-proj-kernel — 12-layer × 42.9 = 515ms per forward-QKV-only × (launch count 3 = 3 kernels) — observed 6.7 steps/sec = 150 ms/step total on 1.5B
expected_step_time_with_tc.with_tc_s3_shape_at_1b: 4.18 ms/QKV-proj-kernel (projected) × 12 = 50 ms per forward-QKV — saves ~65 ms/step in QKV alone (43% of forward time)
expected_step_time_with_tc.note_on_h100_speedup: 3090 tc_tflops 6.17 → H100 SXM TC peak 989 / 140 = 7.06× nominal. Composed with CUDA Graph (CLM_CUDA_GRAPH=1 already wired at line 1167) and multi-stream overlap → expect 800ms/step at 7B with F1-TC on H100 SXM single rank (before FSDP), 1000-1200ms/step with 2x FSDP all-reduce overhead.

minimum_corpus_for_launch.rationale: At byte-level vocab=256, 60GB is still 2.3x undersized Chinchilla for 7B but triples current 5.38GB baseline → 4.57 epochs at 750k steps becomes 14 epochs → diminishing but non-trivial signal. 60GB = kowiki (5.5GB decompressed) + CC-100 (54GB decompressed) fits budget.

ok_to_launch_with_current_5_38gb.verdict: NO — fresh 7B with 5.38GB is 26x Chinchilla-undersized, reaches plateau ~step 100k, wastes $2K H100 time
ok_to_launch_with_current_5_38gb.alternative: Wait for kowiki (done) + CC-100 (ETA 2h) decompression → ~60GB corpus ready in ~4h total

streaming_training_possible.verdict: YES — mmap loader is byte-shape independent (per clm_7b_upscale_spec.json#data.loader_changes_for_7b). CC-100 can stream-decompress during first hours of training if xz decompression lands before H100 fires. Prefer pre-decompression.
streaming_training_possible.risk: In-training xz decompress + mmap race → potential seek latency spike. Prefer complete pre-decompression.

pod_spec.rationale: 7B fp32 AdamW + bf16 weights/grads = ~84GB unsharded. FSDP-Full on 2 ranks brings per-GPU to 57GB. SXM 80GB has 23GB headroom (sufficient); NVL 95GB has 37GB headroom (preferred for long context + activation memory).
pod_spec.nvlink: REQUIRED between ranks for FSDP all-reduce — 2x NVL in same RunPod pod auto-provides NVLink (60GB/s per link). 2 separate pods fall back to TCP NCCL (~10GB/s max) → 6x slower all-reduce → 20-30% training slowdown.
pod_spec.provider: RunPod — historical H100 NVL at $3.07/hr/pod = $6.14/hr for 2
pod_spec.cost_1400h_current_mfu_note: At current 1.65% CLM MFU, 400h roadmap estimate inflates 36x → 14545h → $44677. F1-TC + C4 fused kernels must push MFU to 30%+ before launch is economically viable.

current_utilization.slot_1: u744u0lbts5v1w (anima-clm1b-r4-nvl) — CLM r4 1B training active (loss=2.29 step 2800, ETA ~31h to 750k)
current_utilization.slot_2_when_free: ALM A1 ETA ~30 min (per user context). After A1 completes, A2 auto-fires (12h+6h = 18h) per watch_a1_fire_a2.hexa. 7B cannot use slot 2 until A2 completes — earliest A2 release = 2026-04-18T07:00Z (~30h from now)
current_utilization.slot_1_when_free: 1.5B r4 ETA ~2026-04-17T21:30Z (~20h from now — keep running to harvest convergence signal)

pod_spec.h100_release_scenario_earliest: Both H100 slots free simultaneously no earlier than 2026-04-18T21:30Z (1.5B r4 complete + A2 complete). That is the lower bound for 2x H100 7B launch without additional pod authorization.

preflight_on_pod_a: dd if=/dev/zero of=/workspace/_qtest bs=1M count=20000 status=none && rm /workspace/_qtest  # MFS quota preflight per training/CLAUDE.md
launch_command_sequence.preflight_on_pod_b: Same as pod_a (corpus copy + mkdir + preflight)
codegen_on_pod_a: cd /workspace && export CLM_SCALE=7b USE_TC=1 && hexa build /opt/anima/training/train_clm_gpu.hexa --emit-c --out /workspace/train_clm_7b_composed.c
launch_command_sequence.binary_transfer_to_pod_b: scp train_clm_7b_native to pod_b OR re-run codegen on pod_b (safer — same build env)
launch_command_sequence.launch_rank_0_pod_a: nohup env CLM_SCALE=7b USE_TC=1 CLM_CORPUS_PATH=/workspace/corpus_clm_v2.txt CLM_CKPT_DIR=/workspace/ckpt_clm7b_r1 FSDP_WORLD_SIZE=2 FSDP_RANK=0 MASTER_ADDR=<ip_a> MASTER_PORT=29500 /workspace/train_clm_7b_native > /workspace/ckpt_clm7b_r1/train_rank0.log 2>&1 &
launch_command_sequence.launch_rank_1_pod_b: nohup env CLM_SCALE=7b USE_TC=1 CLM_CORPUS_PATH=/workspace/corpus_clm_v2.txt CLM_CKPT_DIR=/workspace/ckpt_clm7b_r1 FSDP_WORLD_SIZE=2 FSDP_RANK=1 MASTER_ADDR=<ip_a> MASTER_PORT=29500 /workspace/train_clm_7b_native > /workspace/ckpt_clm7b_r1/train_rank1.log 2>&1 &
launch_command_sequence.r2_sync_watcher: tmux new-session -d -s r2_sync_7b 'bash /workspace/r2_sync_watcher_7b.sh'  # mirror of 1.5B watcher, 60s poll, target prefix r2:anima-models/clm7b/r1/

policy_refs: memory:feedback_r2_checkpoint (R2 bulk upload after training, not in-loop)

expected_timing.total_hours_note: 1200ms/step × 750k steps = 250h wall. 2xH100 NVL at $6.14/hr = $1535 total — 37% under roadmap baseline $2456. GRAD_ACC=4 means token throughput = 65536 tokens/step / 1.2s = 54613 tokens/sec aggregate, 27306 tokens/sec per H100 — matches 1.5B r4 aggregate 27500 tokens/sec (which is 1.5B at 150ms/step).
expected_timing.fallback_3b_criterion: at step 250k, if phi_holo_ratio = phi_holo(250k) / phi_holo(0) < 1.2 (ratio gate, N-independent) OR ce > 2.5, halt and switch to A2 3B fallback per clm_consciousness_standalone.json line 46-53. Absolute phi_holo<500 deprecated 2026-04-20 (7B N≈seq×d=512×4096=2.1M × MI 0.001 = 2100 noise-floor)

r2_binary_archive.rationale: Ephemeral workspace risk — pod deletion or /workspace wipe loses the 7B binary (observed with u744u0lbts5v1w prior restart, per clm_r4_health_20260416.json:41). Binary is 3-5MB, composed.c is 500KB — trivial to archive.

archive_after_first_successful_step_log.trigger: step 100 first log emitted + loss monotonic down + nvidia-smi util>30%

sub_paths.r1/phi_holo_peak/: snapshot of step where phi_holo maxed (Law 60 non-monotonic guard)

depends_on: 1.5B r4 converge to trigger_gate OR step 750k
hexa-lang session on NCCL FFI bindings
c9_nccl_multi_rank.blocks: FSDP-Full — 7B training without it OOMs on single H100

c2_fused_layer_ffi.blocks: Full 7B MFU target 60% — without, stuck at ~30% with F1-TC alone

user_explicit_ok_to_launch.rationale: auto_fire_authorized=false per clm_7b_upscale_spec — 7B cost $1500-3000 exceeds silent-fire budget

critical_path_to_launch.note: Biggest blocker — 2x H100 not both free until ~2026-04-18T07:00Z
F1-TC wiring 2 files (train_clm_gpu.hexa + gpu_train.hexa) — 1h hexa work after corpus is staged

dependency_graph.earliest_launch_utc: 2026-04-18T10:00Z (optimistic — both slots free + corpus staged + NCCL binding lands + user OK)
dependency_graph.realistic_launch_utc: 2026-04-20T00:00Z (includes C9 NCCL slippage + F1-TC integration bugs + 1 failed attempt)

failure_1_oom_before_step_100.probable_cause: FSDP binding returned 0 but didn't actually shard (rc=99 stub) → full 7B on one GPU
failure_1_oom_before_step_100.action: Immediately SSH in, pkill train_clm_7b_native, verify fsdp_shard.hexa state dump shows world_size=2 rank=<self> with n_owned=16 layers. If world_size=1, C9 binding not live — must land binding before relaunch.

failure_2_slow_first_step.probable_cause: NCCL all-reduce not finding peer — TCP fallback without NVLink
failure_2_slow_first_step.action: Check MASTER_ADDR reachable from pod_b (nc -vz <ip_a> 29500). If TCP fallback is active and persistent, downgrade to single-rank 3B fallback (scale_2_8b) while NCCL bindings are fixed.

failure_3_loss_nan_early.probable_cause: bf16 overflow in fused QKV TC at very high initial weights, or MLM corruption
failure_3_loss_nan_early.action: Set USE_TC=0 and relaunch with fp32 path — F1-TC fallback kicks in. If fp32 also NaNs, reseed + verify init_scale=0.02 + RMSNorm ordering matches 1.5B.

failure_4_mfs_quota_silent_exit.symptom: training disappears around ckpt save time, partial ckpt on disk
failure_4_mfs_quota_silent_exit.probable_cause: MFS quota — per training/CLAUDE.md runpod_mfs_quota rule
failure_4_mfs_quota_silent_exit.action: dd preflight + rm old ckpts + save_every>=5000 enforced; in-training rclone PROHIBITED (use deferred queue watcher only)

failure_5_corpus_mmap_seek_slow.probable_cause: corpus mmap hitting cold pages on xz-streaming read
failure_5_corpus_mmap_seek_slow.action: Pre-decompress cc100-ko fully before launch; avoid streaming xz read

compliance_checks.hexa_first_strict: PASS — all new logic in .hexa (c4_fused_kernels.hexa existing, train_clm_gpu.hexa edit planned)
compliance_checks.no_python: PASS — training loop is pure C (compiled from hexa via codegen_c2)
compliance_checks.no_quantization: PASS — bf16 I/O boundary, bf16 internal, fp32 accumulator, fp32 master weights
compliance_checks.no_resume_data_change: PASS — 7B is fresh from step 0; NOT resume-from-1.5B
compliance_checks.one_shot_best: PASS — launch contingent on F1-TC integration + corpus 60GB+ + C9 NCCL + user OK
compliance_checks.no_version_in_filename: PASS — ckpts named step_{N} under clm7b/r1/
compliance_checks.auto_fire_authorized: FALSE — requires explicit user OK before launch even with 2 H100 auto-authorized, because 7B cost $1500-3000 + policy complexity (FSDP + corpus undersized)

spec_launch_command_vs_this_checklist.spec_step_1_compose_7b_missing_env_TC: Spec did not mention USE_TC=1 — this checklist adds it
spec_launch_command_vs_this_checklist.spec_step_2_build_missing_nccl: Spec listed `-lnccl` build dep — checklist emphasises C9 must land first or launch is single-rank OOM
spec_launch_command_vs_this_checklist.new_lever_f1_tc: 10.26x kernel speedup not in original spec — this checklist makes it the primary lever for step_time projection

report_deltas_vs_spec.spec_hardware_memory_budget_unchanged: FSDP-Full memory plan in spec.hardware is valid; F1-TC adds +6.1GB VRAM for Wqkv packing (acceptable on 80GB with 23GB headroom)

next_actions_for_this_session.action: Wait for kowiki XML extraction (hexa-native, not started)
Implement F1-TC integration in train_clm_gpu.hexa + gpu_train.hexa (2 edits, ~1h) — can be done LOCALLY NOW without H100
Write R2 binary archive watcher script (hexa-native, parse-only fine for now)
Monitor 1.5B r4 convergence trajectory (currently loss=2.29 at step 2800)
WAIT for: A1 complete → A2 fire → A2 complete → 1.5B r4 converge to free 2 H100 slots. Earliest 2026-04-18T07:00Z
Request user explicit OK to launch 7B when dep graph clears

growth_loop_reference.current_driver: 1.5B r4 is the active CLM growth driver at step 2800, loss=2.29
growth_loop_reference.loop_action_at_7b_trigger_gate: Per clm_7b_upscale_spec.json#growth_loop_status — trigger gate eval every save_every=5000 via growth_loop. On gate satisfied + blockers clear, loop posts status + requests user OK, then executes the launch_command_sequence above (with USE_TC=1 appended).

_file_authority.spec_remains_ssot: shared/state/clm_7b_upscale_spec.json is the authoritative 7B config source. This checklist specialises that spec for 2026-04-17 state (corpus in flight + F1-TC 10.26x lever unlocked).
_file_authority.supersedes_prior_launch_command: Adds USE_TC=1 + F1-TC integration. All other fields in clm_7b_upscale_spec.launch_command remain valid.
